hero.title: Every bite has a purpose.
hero.subtitle: Artisan burger house in Florianopolis since 2015. For every burger sold, R$1 is donated to social and environmental causes.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.donated: donated to social and environmental causes
impact.description: Since 2015, for every burger sold, R$1 goes to social projects in Greater Florianopolis. We have already surpassed R$200 thousand in donations.

menuHighlights.title: Our Burgers
menuHighlights.subtitle: Artisan black angus, specialty buns, and homemade sauces.

t1.text: Top marks! For the flavor, quality, atmosphere and care. The burger is impeccable, delicious.
t1.author: TripAdvisor Guest

t2.text: We were served by Joao who was super attentive... what a delight! Impeccable flavor and generous portions!
t2.author: TripAdvisor Guest

t3.text: From the service to the quality of the burgers, everything exceeded my expectations... you can feel the care in every detail.
t3.author: TripAdvisor Guest

historyPreview.title: Our Story
historyPreview.text: In 2015, three friends tired of the basic bun-meat-cheese-lettuce combo decided to create something different. Usina do Hamburguer was born: artisan burgers with quality ingredients and a greater purpose.

historyPage.title: Our Story
historyPage.intro: Founded in 2015 in Trindade, Florianopolis, Usina do Hamburguer was born from the dream of three friends who wanted to go beyond the conventional burger.

timeline.2015: Opening of the first location in Trindade, next to UFSC.
timeline.2018: Milestone of R$50 thousand in donations to social and environmental causes.
timeline.2022: Opening of the Centro location on Av. Hercilio Luz.
timeline.2024: Expansion to Rio Tavares and Itapema. Over R$200 thousand donated.
timeline.2026: 4 locations, 24 employees, 39 thousand followers and +8,500 reviews.

socialCause.title: R$1 Per Burger
socialCause.description: For every burger sold, R$1 is donated to social and environmental projects in Greater Florianopolis. We have already surpassed R$200 thousand in donations, supporting communities, education and the environment.

petBurguer.title: Pet Burguer
petBurguer.description: We are truly pet-friendly. We created the Pet Burguer: a special burger made for your best four-legged friend.

menuPage.title: Menu
menuPage.subtitle: Fresh ingredients, artisan black angus and lots of flavor.

locationsPage.title: Our Locations
locationsPage.subtitle: 4 addresses in Santa Catarina for you to enjoy.

ctaFinal.title: Real hunger deserves a real burger.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Order now through your favorite channel and taste how flavor and purpose go hand in hand.
